title: Background: Complex Numbers - Polar Form and Angle Computation
summary: This page discusses the behavior of complex exponentials e^(α+jω)t as t approaches infinity, emphasizing that the real part α determines growth or decay. It warns about calculator errors when computing angles of complex numbers using inverse tangent, particularly for numbers in the second and third quadrants. An example (B.1) demonstrates converting complex numbers from Cartesian to polar form.
